species.name: Crab
flavor: Walks sideways out of principle.
Collects shiny pebbles it will never use.
Pinches first, apologizes never.

species.name: Starfish
flavor: Can regrow an arm. Shows off about it.
Hasn't moved in three tides. On purpose, probably.
Dreams of being a constellation.

species.name: Seahorse
flavor: Holds onto kelp during rough tides. And your finger.
The dads carry the babies here.
Gallops at a majestic two metres per hour.

species.name: Octopus
flavor: Has three hearts and shares none of them.
Already figured out the tide pattern. Won't tell.
Once unscrewed a jar from the inside. Allegedly.

species.name: Turtle
flavor: Has seen ten thousand tides. Unimpressed by yours.
Carries its house so it never worries about the water.
Slow is smooth, smooth is fast.

species.name: Pufferfish
flavor: Inflates when startled. Is always startled.
Mostly spikes, partly grudge.
Practices deep breathing. Too well.

species.name: Jellyfish
flavor: No brain, no heart, no worries.
Glows softly when the water rises. Coincidence?
Older than the tides themselves.

species.name: Axolotl
flavor: Smiles through everything. Everything.
A rare visitor from quieter waters.
Refuses to grow up. Respect.
